visuals.title: Lexer-Parser Interaction
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Recognition of Tokens</text>
  
  <!-- Lexical Analyzer -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Lexical Analyzer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Input String -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input String
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Tokens -->
  <rect x="250" y="70" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tokens
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Symbol Table -->
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Symbol Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Input to Lexical Analyzer -->
  <path d="M110 150 L110 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Lexical Analyzer to Tokens -->
  <path d="M170 95 L250 95" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Lexical Analyzer to Symbol Table -->
  <path d="M140 120 L140 150 L250 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Process Labels -->
  <text x="200" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Tokenize
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="190" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Store Identifiers
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Example Token Output -->
  <rect x="150" y="220" width="120" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Example Output:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    (ID, "count")
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    (ASSIGN, "=")
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    (NUMBER, "42")
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
